title: crocodeilanthe infundibulosa
parts: Crocodeilanthe infundibulosa has many medicinal parts, such as the leaves, flowers, and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The leaves of this plant are rich in alkaloids, including vincamine and vincristine, which have been shown to have vasodilatory and antineoplastic properties, respectively. The flowers of Crocodeilanthe infundibulosa contain iridoids, such as aucubin and harpagoside, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and spasmolytic activities. The roots of the plant contain glycosides, including gentiopicroside and sweroside, which have been reported to have antioxidant and anti-diarrheal properties.
